Pichai also highlights AI's potential to reduce workplace burnout, particularly in demanding professions. While acknowledging disruption, he encourages optimism about AI's positive impact on future careers.

description: R Praggnanandhaa has achieved a historic victory at Norway Chess, a feat even Vishy Anand couldn't accomplish. The young Indian Grandmaster secured the title by defeating Vincent Keymer in the final round, overcoming fatigue from prior tournaments. His remarkable comeback, including four consecutive classical wins, has placed him among chess elite, proving his exceptional talent.

title: ‘Among those most educated ... ’: Elon Musk flags India’s falling fertility rate
description: India's fertility rate has slipped beneath the 2.1 children per woman threshold, with a majority of states now reflecting this trend. Elon Musk pointed out that educated women have long surpassed this level, indicating a significant demographic transition. This evolving landscape hints at a slower population increase and the looming concerns of an aging society.

title: 'Concentration of curry': Singapore blocks 14 anti-Indian posts likely from China
description: Singapore has ordered YouTube, Facebook, and X to block 14 posts targeting its Indian community and multiculturalism. The Ministry of Home Affairs stated the content, originating from overseas and likely China, aimed to sow discord by attacking the nation's multiracial society. These actions underscore Singapore's commitment to social cohesion and opposition to xenophobia.

title: Ed Sheeran's real journey: From small town dreamer to global star
description: Emerging from a life of hardship in London to become a global phenomenon, Ed Sheeran embodies the spirit of determination. Dismissed by record companies due to his unconventional style and sound, he pushed forward, driven by resilience. His heartfelt lyrics, forged in the tranquility of Suffolk, struck a chord worldwide, demonstrating that authenticity can overshadow commercial expectations.

A movement losing momentum and daughters as Haryana’s sex ratio declines
description: Launched by PM Modi in Panipat in 2015, the Beti Bachao, Beti Padhao campaign initially delivered strong results. Haryana’s Sex Ratio at Birth rose from 838 in 2010 to 923 by 2019, driven by strict raids on pre-natal testing centres, inter-State crackdowns, monthly video conference reviews, and fixed accountability. However, data for the first four months of 2026 show that the number of girl babies born has dipped below 900, sparking fears that the programme is losing focus and momentum, reports Ashok Kumar

title: Why India moved on from Suryakumar Yadav - The numbers behind the end of the SKY era
description: Three months after leading India to the T20 World Cup title, Suryakumar Yadav has lost both the captaincy and his place in India's T20I setup. The selectors insist the decision was driven by form and the need to look ahead to the next World Cup cycle. A deep dive into the numbers reveals why. From one of the greatest peaks in T20 history to declining returns, waning match-winning influence and rising competition from younger rivals, the data explains why India chose the future over the past.
